title: Oxymeris dolichantha
taxonomy: Oxymeris dolichantha is a species of sea snail. It is a marine gastropod mollusk. Oxymeris dolichantha belongs to the family Cancellariidae, which is a family of medium-sized to large sea snails. This species is further classified into the genus Oxymeris. The classification is based on its shell morphology and anatomical characteristics.
